name: add_event_listener
description: Wire a persistent listener on any UnityEvent (e.g. Button.onClick, Toggle.onValueChanged, Slider.onValueChanged, or custom UnityEvents on your own scripts). Adds a new persistent call entry that appears in the Inspector's event panel. The listener calls a method on a target component when the event fires.

game_object.description: The name of the GameObject that has the component with the event.

component_type.description: Optional. The component type that contains the event (e.g. 'Button', 'Toggle', 'Slider'). If omitted, searches all components on the GameObject for the event.

event_name.description: The name of the UnityEvent field, e.g. 'onClick', 'onValueChanged'. Supports auto-matching of m_ prefix (e.g. 'onClick' finds 'm_OnClick').

target_game_object.description: The name of the GameObject that has the target component to call.

target_component_type.description: The component type on the target GameObject that has the method to call, e.g. 'GameManager', 'AudioSource', 'Animator'.

method_name.description: The name of the method to call on the target component, e.g. 'Play', 'SetActive', 'OnButtonClicked'.

argument.description: Optional constant argument to pass to the method. Auto-detected as bool ('true'/'false'), int, float (must contain '.'), or string. Omit for void methods.
